publishedAbstract: - Ceph health shows warning state due to the following errors.- ```FAILED Result: hostbyte=DID_OK driverbyte=DRIVER_OK cmd_age=0s```- ```HEALTH_ERR 1 scrub errors; Too many repaired reads on 1 OSDs; Possible data damage: 1 pg inconsistent```
publishedTitle: Degraded ODF Storage in Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform 4.x due to Ceph Health Warnings
